issues.description: Missing condition to verify target is rested. The card text specifies 'rested DON!! cards' as the source, requiring a condition check before the action.
Target scope incomplete. Card allows giving to opponent's Leader OR opponent's Characters, but DSL only specifies ChooseOpponentCharacter. Should allow Leader as alternative target.
Missing 'OncePerTurn' constraint. Card text explicitly states '[Once Per Turn]' which must be encoded in the DSL.
